subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us, and the Wronged One hath hearkened unto thy call, and the tongue of His loving-kindness hath answered thee from the Kingdom of His utterance with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و سمع المظلوم ندائک و اجابک لسان عنایته فی ملکوت بیانه بما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
